options.name: -autoRemaster
options.description: Binds the cell to it's layout view

options.name: -copyTechFromReflib
options.description: Copies the technology file to the current design library

options.name: -cutRows
options.description: Specifies that rows are cut against placement obstructions and block halos

options.name: -early_global_route
options.description: Writes out a design containing early_global_route data

options.name: -leafViewNames
options.description: {<lefView1> <lefView2> ...} Specifies a list of view names to be searched for during leaf cell instance binding

options.name: -noConnectivity
options.description: Writes out a design that contains instances and physical shapes but without nets, pins or instance pins

options.name: -noOverwriteAbstract
options.description: Prevents the software from overwriting abstracts of partitions and blackboxes

options.name: -noStdCells
options.description: Instances of core cells are not saved in OpenAccess database. But if instance is either fixed or covered then it is saved.

options.name: -refLibs
options.description: Specifies the names of the reference libraries
